Crescent Textiles (Pvt) Ltd: Budget approved by Board of Directors 15-Jun-2024. Monthly budget is annual / 12 unless seasonally adjusted.

column4: EU demand softened Q3-Q4; two major orders from Hamburg Textilhaus delayed to FY 2025-26
Cotton spot price increased 12% above budgeted rate due to Sindh flood impact on domestic crop
PKR depreciated 4.2% against USD in Q4 vs budgeted 1.5% annual depreciation; hedging programme covered only 60% of exposure
NEPRA tariff revision in Jan 2025 (+18%) not anticipated in budget; gas tariff increased 15% in Mar 2025
Additional freight costs from Red Sea shipping disruption; rerouting via Cape of Good Hope added 8-12 days transit
